title: yambol's simple ahh keystrokes
description: Shout-outs to john892 for making my dumb ahh brain think of this.
body:
**Just a simple keystrokes mod, not much fancier than sk1er's keystrokes for 1.8.9 — just adds more keys and a mouse overlay, too!**
